title: Steamed Russian Dumplings with Mushroom Filling
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring steamed dumplings filled with sautéed mushrooms.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and water to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
In a pan, sauté mushrooms, onion, and garlic until softened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Place a spoonful of the mushroom mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil and place a steamer basket over the pot.
Steam the dumplings for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve with sour cream if desired.
